attributes.action: To stop the Labour Party being part of the European Union on all levels
attributes.additional_details: The British people voted to leave the European Union and not to go through the back door and take us back in
attributes.background: For the government to accept the majority of the British people decision on leaving the European Union

rejection.details:
The Labour Party is not the responsibility of Government - what you are asking for is thus unclear.  However, this petition (below) may encapsulate what you are wanting to ask for:

 https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756199
